testcase.name: test_forever_free_subscription_status

failure.message: AssertionError: is_read_only should be False assert None == False + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcddab2d5980>('is_read_only') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcddab2d5980> = {'cancel_at_period_end': None, 'current_period_end': None, 'days_remaining': None, 'is_active': True, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_demo_forever_free.py:210: in test_forever_free_subscription_status assert data.get("is_read_only") == False, "is_read_only should be False" E AssertionError: is_read_only should be False E assert None == False E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcddab2d5980>('is_read_only') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfcddab2d5980> = {'cancel_at_period_end': None, 'current_period_end': None, 'days_remaining': None, 'is_active': True, ...}.get
